ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, HR, Employee) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., login, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action being audited */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the audit was recorded */,
  "audit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES user_actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., action alert, system update) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "base_salary" TEXT /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "gross_pay" TEXT /* Gross pay for the period */,
  "tax_deductions" TEXT /* Total tax deductions */,
  "net_pay" TEXT /* Net pay after deductions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balance" (
  "leave_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick, parental) */,
  "available_balance" INTEGER /* Available leave balance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave requested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
